County hub · Updated June 2026

Lake County Restaurant Health Grades

54%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
113Restaurants
5Cities

Lake County leans american — 36 of the 113 restaurants we track — and we grade each on its latest Florida health inspection, not its menu. 54% currently hold an A, on an average diner rating of 4.2 stars.

Lake County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Lake County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 113 Lake County restaurants we grade, 61 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Lake County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Lake County?

We currently publish 113 graded restaurants in Lake County, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 61 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
